caption: Pin down / stall (Battle.OrderMode.PIN_DOWN, ; to arm): a defensive attack stance for a unit confronted head-on. It swings roughly half as often as a normal stance (PIN_DOWN_ATTACK_INTERVAL vs. ATTACK_INTERVAL) -- a genuine stall, not a pure defensive buff -- but each swing's follow-through opens a brief window where its own defense is scaled down (PIN_DOWN_DEFENSE_FACTOR), so a foe that lands a hit during that window does more damage than it otherwise would. The clip stages a clean head-on Infantry-vs-Infantry clash so nothing else (flanking, formation, charge) confounds the read; the accompanying state dump (tools/demo/dump-state.sh with the input's "state" ticks) lets a reviewer confirm the slower attack cadence and the exposure window opening/closing by exact values rather than eyeballing the footage.
